sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32847" key="e)kroi/zhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκροίζ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32847.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rushing forth,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φωτός</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:283" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">283</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
